message:
fix(clippy): resolve redundant_locals and tuple_array_conversions lint errors

Remove redundant `let dz = dz;` binding in proptest_kalman_watchdog.rs
and convert tuple-to-array initializers to use `.into()` in
proptest_runtime.rs to satisfy clippy -D warnings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
